content:
how el perceives the owners personality in their dog
sheen lives on in albie
open with violence - el imagines what could be happening behind the door when the police knock on their door and the scene replays with each reality
show other places where el imagines multiple outcomes and sees how the situation could play out each way

Maybe the dogs say famous quotes? Like memes?

EL holds a COUNCIL of DOGS.

EL is invited to the office and she is walked into the basement where she meets the groundskeeper who should be introduced earlier in the film. This later scene could mirror Zodiac basement scene.

Write 3 more scenes: council of dogs (montage of each dog leading el to a new clue), meeting with Gus lures her into the basement, imagined suspects of Sheen being frat drugged and raped by college kids, el waits outside college kids dorms to try and get their attention

EL is a Seminole native american

SHEEN is missing, not necessarily been found dead. sheen has some sort of big inheritance.
